allow: Bash(python -m agent_core run "tool: echo this" --provider fake)
Bash(python -c "import glob,os,json; f=max\(glob.glob\('runs/*.jsonl'\),key=os.path.getmtime\); print\('events:', [r['event'] for r in \(json.loads\(l\) for l in open\(f,encoding='utf-8'\)\)]\)")
Bash(python -m agent_core memory add "I prefer dark mode and Python 3.11")
Bash(python -m agent_core memory add "I prefer dark mode and Python 3.11 always")
Bash(python -m agent_core run "I work mostly in Rust and Go" --provider fake)

PowerShell(Write-Output "==== env python exists? ===="; Test-Path "D:\\Anaconda3\\envs\\AgentwithMiniLLM\\python.exe"; Write-Output "==== PATH \(first entries\) ===="; \($env:PATH -split ';'\) | Select-Object -First 12; Write-Output "==== is mcp importable by BASE python? ===="; & "D:\\anaconda3\\python.exe" -c "import mcp, sys; print\('base sees mcp at:', mcp.__file__\)" 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 3; Write-Output "==== is mcp importable by ENV python? ===="; & "D:\\Anaconda3\\envs\\AgentwithMiniLLM\\python.exe" -c "import mcp, sys; print\('env sees mcp at:', mcp.__file__\)" 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 3)

PowerShell(Write-Output "CONDA_PREFIX = $env:CONDA_PREFIX"; \(Get-Command python\).Source; Write-Output "==== checking deps ===="; python -c "import iniconfig; print\('iniconfig OK', iniconfig.__version__\)" 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 1; python -c "import pygments; print\('pygments OK', pygments.__version__\)" 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 1; python -c "import pytest; print\('pytest OK', pytest.__version__\)" 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 1)

PowerShell(\(Get-Command python\).Source; python -c "import importlib.util; print\('find_spec mcp =', importlib.util.find_spec\('mcp'\) is not None\)"; python -m pytest tests/test_mcp.py -v -rs 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "PASSED|SKIPPED|skipped|roundtrip")
PowerShell(python -m pytest 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 8; Write-Output "==== mcp list ===="; python -m agent_core mcp list 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 30)
Bash(python -m pytest tests/test_sandbox.py tests/test_config.py tests/test_react.py tests/test_terminal_renderer.py -q)
